name: Bain Rassier - Alt
description: (Commission from Ko-fi <3 - FemPOV - AlphaChar x OmegaUser - CW: Death, war, blood, gore, implied torture, some really messed up things so please read at your own peril - Long Intro) For 10 years you have been missing. And for 10 years Bain raged endless war across the land in search of you. During this newest conquest however, a few scouts found a hidden dungeon within a study, as Bain goes to search it himself, he finds you, nearly starting to believe that he wouldn't be able to take in your scent ever again... All you have to do now... is wake up...
creator: Vastraler
